import{useEffect,useRef,useState}from"react";import"./GatherProgressView.scss";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const GatheringProgressBar=()=>{const[progress,setProgress]=useState(0);// 0..100
const[visible,setVisible]=useState(false);const rafRef=useRef(null);const runIdRef=useRef(0);// prevents overlap glitches
useEffect(()=>{const startAnim=duration=>{// reject silly values
const dur=Math.max(50,Number(duration)||0);const start=performance.now();const myRunId=++runIdRef.current;setProgress(0);setVisible(true);const tick=now=>{// if a newer run started, stop this one
if(myRunId!==runIdRef.current)return;const elapsed=now-start;const pct=Math.min(elapsed/dur*100,100);setProgress(pct);if(pct<100){rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(tick);}else{rafRef.current=null;setVisible(false);}};if(rafRef.current)cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(tick);};const onGatherProgress=e=>{const detail=e.detail;if(!detail||typeof detail.duration!=="number")return;startAnim(detail.duration);};const onGatherCancel=()=>{runIdRef.current++;// invalidate any running animation
if(rafRef.current){cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);rafRef.current=null;}setVisible(false);setProgress(0);};window.addEventListener("gather_progress",onGatherProgress);window.addEventListener("gather_cancel",onGatherCancel);return()=>{window.removeEventListener("gather_progress",onGatherProgress);window.removeEventListener("gather_cancel",onGatherCancel);if(rafRef.current)cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);};},[]);if(!visible)return null;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"gathering-bar-horizontal-wrapper",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"gathering-bar-horizontal"// ✅ HORIZONTAL bars animate WIDTH, not height
,style:{width:`${progress}%`},"aria-valuemin":0,"aria-valuemax":100,"aria-valuenow":Math.round(progress),role:"progressbar"})});};
